Keyboard Shortcuts

Performance Overlays
PToggle JS Performance HUD v2 (top-right)

Help
HShow / hide this help panel
Info
The native MinnieVG Performance HUD (bottom of canvas) is always visible.
It displays FPS, frame time, VBO stats, and a frame-time mini-graph rendered
directly as MinnieVG geometry.
Press H to close
